title: A Day in the life of an Indian Student | Georgia State University| Atlanta
body:
Hi Sheethal
I’m an Indian student planning to study in the US, and your journey really caught my attention.

I just had a few questions, if you don’t mind sharing:

Roughly how much was the total cost for your ms degree? btw i am planning for 4 year UG

How did you manage the finances — part-time work + intenships + loans or parents’ support, or a mix of these?

Are you planning to work in the US long-term, or return to India after graduation ?

No pressure at all — even brief insights would be really helpful. Thanks for sharing your experience!
author: @sasankjalumuru

title: A Day in the life of an Indian Student | Georgia State University| Atlanta

title: Kennesaw State University (Kennesaw Campus) - Virtual Walking Tour [4k 60fps]
body:
I will hug the campus forever ♾️
I was so scared one night
Wishing Kennesaw was here for me
It saves my life I nearly died from Cherokee attack
And Kennesaw state caught me in time I fell on her and she saved me
My heart stopped beating for 22 hours and Kennesaw state was the reason my heart restarted again 😮
Hooty Hoo 🖤💛🦉🦉
author: @Littlebiologygirl
